title: Alpha's Server [ABANDONED]
description: This project has been abandoned and will not receive any future updates or looked into. Kindly use new modpacks and stuff
body:
⚡ [Alpha's Server] – The Ultimate Multiplayer & Performance Modpack! ⚡
🚀 Designed for Smooth, Lag-Free Multiplayer Fun! 🚀

Tired of lag ruining your gameplay? Want the best performance and multiplayer experience without sacrificing content? This modpack is carefully curated to provide high FPS, seamless multiplayer compatibility, and an enhanced vanilla+ experience for both solo and server play!

🔹 Features That Make This Modpack Stand Out 🔹
✅ Ultra-Smooth Performance – Powered by Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, and more to eliminate lag and boost FPS.
✅ Multiplayer-Ready – Perfect for playing with friends, with server-friendly optimizations and minimal conflicts.
✅ Quality-of-Life Improvements – Enjoy better UI, improved controls, immersive visuals, and smoother gameplay.
✅ Handpicked Mods – Carefully selected for stability, fun, and a balanced experience without unnecessary bloat.
✅ Content Creator Friendly – Feel free to feature this modpack in videos/streams—just credit the pack!

📥 Download now and experience Minecraft like never before!

🎮 Compatible with both single-player and multiplayer servers.

🔥 This modpack follows the Creative Commons BY-NC 4.0 license: Everyone can play it, but redistribution, modifications, and commercial use are not allowed.

🚀 Optimized, balanced, and multiplayer-ready—this is the perfect modpack for an amazing experience!
